heading: What I can do for you.
sub: Everything from the initial cut to the final campaign. Built for creators and brands who want to scale their content without losing their minds.

items.title: Video Editing
items.desc: High-retention edits in Premiere Pro & After Effects. I don't just cut footage; I build pacing that keeps people watching.

items.title: Content Operations
items.desc: Managing your entire production pipeline. From organizing raw assets to scheduling the final post across platforms.

items.title: Paid Social & Ads
items.desc: Setting up and running Meta ad campaigns to guarantee your best content reaches a wider audience.

samples: Delivered a commissioned edit for a U.S.-based recording artist that reached 3.9M views natively.
Managed the content production schedule for a large student organization, end to end.
Ran successful Facebook ad campaigns for Tagaytay Highlands real estate, handling creatives and targeting.
Edited promotional videos from raw footage to publish, driving 124M+ cumulative views across all platforms.
note: Let's build a content system that works for you.
